body:
Hey Amara, following up on our conversation from last week about the [Verdant Grid](startups/verdant-grid) deal — I've had a chance to dig into their latest technical diligence materials and I'm feeling pretty good about the grid optimization layer they've built on top of the inference stack. I know you mentioned Halfway was still calibrating position size at the seed stage for climate infra plays, so I wanted to check in before we move toward a term sheet conversation with the founders. We're thinking something in the $2.5M range for our check, which would leave room for a lead if you wanted to anchor the round. Would love to get on a quick call this week to compare notes — I think our views on the market are pretty aligned and it'd be useful to figure out if there's a co-investment angle here before either of us tips our hand to the team.

Lena
